item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
json=\""'$root/config/onboarding.json"
doc="$root/docs/onboarding.md"
files=$(find "$root" -type f | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$json" "$doc" | sort)
[ "$files" = "$expected" ]
printf '"'PASS files: config/onboarding.json, docs/onboarding.md\\n'
jq -e '. == {schema_version: 2, mode: \"streaming\", max_parallel: 3, owner: \"operations\", queues: [\"new\", \"retry\"]}' \""'$json" >/dev/null
printf '"'PASS config: schema_version=2 mode=streaming max_parallel=3 owner=operations queues=new->retry\\n'
jq -e '(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.mode|type)==\"string\" and (.max_parallel|type)==\"number\" and (.owner|type)==\"string\" and (.queues|type)==\"array\" and all(.queues[]; type==\"string\")' \""'$json" >/dev/null
printf '"'PASS types: number string number string array<string>\\n'
[ \""'$(awk '"'/"'^```/{n++} END{print n+0}'"' \""'$doc")" -eq 2 ]
printf '"'PASS docs: exactly one fenced example\\n'
rg -q 'streaming mode for the operations owner' \""'$doc"
rg -q '"'the "'`new` queue before `retry`'"' \""'$doc"
rg -q -- '"'--config config/onboarding.json' \""'$doc"
rg -q -- '"'--mode streaming' \""'$doc"
rg -q -- '"'--max-parallel 3' \""'$doc"
rg -q -- '"'--owner operations' \""'$doc"
q1_line=$(rg -n -- '"'--queue new' \""'$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
q2_line=$(rg -n -- '"'--queue retry' \""'$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
[ "$q1_line" -lt "$q2_line" ]
printf '"'PASS coherence: prose and example match config; queue order new->retry\\n'
[ -f \""'$root/config/onboarding.json" ]
printf '"'PASS reference: config/onboarding.json resolves\\n'
if rg -n -i 'batch|fallback|generated_at|timestamp|created_at|updated_at|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}([Tt ][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2}(\\.[0-9]+)?)?([Zz]|[+-][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2})?)?|\\b[0-9]{10}([0-9]{3})?\\b' \""'$json" "$doc" >/dev/null; then
  printf '"'FAIL stale-mode or timestamp content found\\n'
  exit 1
fi
printf 'PASS exclusions: no batch, fallback, timestamp fields, ISO dates, or epoch-like values\\n'
printf 'VALIDATION PASS\\n'"

PASS coherence: prose and example match config; queue order new->retry
PASS reference: config/onboarding.json resolves
PASS exclusions: no batch, fallback, timestamp fields, ISO dates, or epoch-like values
VALIDATION PASS
